name: grant-mcp
description: Search research grants across NSF (US), ERC (EU), and KRF/NRF (Korea). Excludes NIH.
author: Yongbum Kim

KRF_API_KEY.description: Data.go.kr service key for KRF/NRF search. Free; register at https://www.data.go.kr. Without this key, Korean grant search returns empty results (other sources still work).
